name: pyobjc-framework-launchservices

metadata.name: pyobjc-framework-LaunchServices
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Wrappers for the framework LaunchServices on macOS

documentation:
Deprecated wrappers for the "LaunchServices" framework on macOS.

Use the "CoreServices" bindings instead.


Project links
-------------

* `Documentation <https://pyobjc.readthedocs.io/en/latest/>`_

* `Issue Tracker <https://github.com/ronaldoussoren/pyobjc/issues>`_

* `Repository <https://github.com/ronaldoussoren/pyobjc/>`_

modules.name: LaunchServices
documentation:
Python mapping for the LaunchServices framework.

This module does not contain docstrings for the wrapped code, check Apple's
documentation for details on how to use these functions and classes.
